text: Starting market analysis. Reviewing the vision brief and PRD — the single-habit constraint is a meaningful differentiator from Habitica, Streaks, and Notion-based approaches.
Found a handful of habit-simplicity apps but none commit as hard as yours. Streaks (Crunchy Bagel) is closest but still supports multiple habits and is iOS-only and paid.
Good. Any sign people actually want this constraint, or is it just our bet?
App Store reviews on multi-habit apps frequently mention overwhelm and abandonment. That's indirect validation. Hard validation would need a landing-page waitlist test before launch.
Market analysis saved to docs/office/03-market-analysis.md. Passing to UI/UX Expert.
